allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total: {len\(data\)}'\); [print\(f\\"{r['first_name']} {r['last_name']} | {r['department']} | {r['job_title']} | {r['location']} | active={r['is_active']}\\"\) for r in data[:5]]")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/teams -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Avengers","description":"Core backend squad"}')
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; teams=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{t['name']}: {t['member_count']} members\\"\) for t in teams]")
